form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr7) over 1609m at Bunbury beaten 25 m by Karaoke Star (1:58.40) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on April 4 at $101. Before that 8th (Sr2) over 1776m at Wagin, beaten 35 m by Nowuseemegrin (2:16.00) in 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on April 2 at $31. Unlikely to finish in the winner's circle.

form.formComment: Backing up quickly since being well beaten Pinjarra over 2185m, 6 days ago before that was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 2180m at Wagin, beaten 30 m by Money Well Spent (2:45.00) in 4yo+ 2-4 WINs on April 2 at $23. Recent form hasn't been good enough.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Sr3) over 2180m at Wagin, beaten 13 m by Satan Princess (2:46.20) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 27 at $31. Showed ability the race before when he won by 1.75 m when quickly away, (Fr2) at this track (2:13.30) beating Akabah in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 22 at $10. Keep him in mind.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Vinnies Star at Gloucester Park over 1730m in a 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 7 at $15. Raced better the start before that with a game effort when 2nd (20m Fr1) over 2503m at Gloucester Park beaten 6 m by Brewery Lane (3:16.60) in NR up to 80 on March 31 at $15. Definite winning chance.
